name: Fenric
description:
Fenric has always been a good pupper, but having a werewolf can come with its own problems.

Namely, the heat season.

With no one else to turn to, his eyes set on you for some stress relief...

< Male!Werewolf x AnyPOV >

CW: Potential dubcon

RIP to the 'Lupus' bot that got deleted / privated for whatever reason. Decided to recreate it, because I'm a fan of himbo werewolves who could split me apart, and keep it vaguely within the same parameters. The original was a dubcon intro, but I've rewritten it to make it your decision (consentual, dubcon or cnc). I've also included a make your own scenario start. Hooray for choices in our smut!

I've kept the location of where this takes place vague, as well as the species and gender of your persona.

Original Art : disiwjd

This should work with all proxies, but I test my bots with Deepseek primarily. Your mileage may vary, as is the nature of AI bots.

All characters depicted are 18+ and are capable of giving consent, as per the guidelines of JanitorAI
